activities.title: Define Telemetry Requirements
activities.description: Map 使用者 intent 供 提示-區塊 (111) 與 round/Session (112) telemetry 到 runtime 檔案 與 data fields.

activities.title: 規劃 提示 區塊 Telemetry (111)
activities.description: Document 區塊 來源, names, inject policy, estimated tokens/length, correlation IDs, 與 dedicated telemetry 項目 points that feed `session/telemetry.ts` ( authoritative sink) while keeping `session/monitor.ts` downstream.

activities.title: 規劃 Round/Session Usage Telemetry (112)
activities.description: Define instrumentation around processor.ts/compaction.ts 使用 Sessionid, roundIndex, 請求id, Provider/帳號 metadata, token breakdowns, 與 壓縮 states.

activities.title: Validation, Handoff & Sidebar Consumption
activities.description: Align diagrams, tasks, validation plans, 與 sidebar consumption so telemetry instrumentation (透過 `session/telemetry.ts`) can 是 executed 使用 baseline/after evidence, fail-fast controls, 與 UI card taxonomy that consumes `session/monitor.ts` outputs.

arrows.label: Telemetry 規劃 使用 traceability 到 111/112
Planning artifacts, baseline data, diagram tools
提示 區塊 data definitions feed round/Session telemetry assumptions
